title: A Twist in Ukraine’s Drone Campaign Is ‘Really Hurting the Russians’
summary_full: Midrange attacks, using upgraded drones that Ukraine produces in huge numbers, are causing fuel shortages and complicating troop rotations.
summary_public: Midrange attacks, using upgraded drones that Ukraine produces in huge numbers, are causing fuel shortages and complicating troop rotations.

UA.label: positive
UA.evidence: Ukraine’s Drone Campaign Is ‘Really Hurting the Russians’
